reasoning_chain_text: 1. Determine the number of acts in Il trovatore and La rondine.
2. Compare the act counts and return whether Il trovatore has fewer acts.
original_final_question: Does Il trovatore have fewer acts than La rondine? Write your answer as [ANSWER].
